title: Incident Response Training Completion Tracking

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: HTTP Event Collector (HEC), Splunk Add-on for ServiceNow (Splunkbase 1928)
spl:
index=hr_training sourcetype=lms:completion earliest=-365d course_id="IR-101"
| stats latest(completed_at) as completed by user_id
| inputlookup append=t ir_required_roles.csv
| stats first(completed) as completed, values(role) as roles by user_id
| where isnull(completed) AND roles="SOC"
value: Joins LMS completion events with HR role for IR-2 incident response training evidence.
implementation: (1) Hash user identifiers consistently; (2) refresh role lookup from IdM; (3) quarterly compliance report; (4) store exports for assessors.
visualization: Table (missing training), Single value (% complete), Bar chart (by team)
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
